titleMn: Өдөр 15: Өдөр тутмын үйлдэл ба үйл үгс
objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 action verbs, Present Continuous (am/is/are + -ing), listening, speaking, homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. 20 үйлдлийн үг, Present Continuous (am/is/are + -ing) дүрэм, сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Describe actions happening right now using Present Continuous: am/is/are + verb-ing.
contentMn: Яг одоо болж буй үйлдлийг Present Continuous: am/is/are + verb-ing хэлбэрээр илэрхийлнэ.

vocabulary.example: I brush my teeth every morning.
She is washing her hands now.
He is cleaning his room today.
She is cooking dinner right now.
They are studying English now.
I am listening to music now.
He is watching TV at the moment.
We are talking to our teacher.
She is walking to school now.
They are sitting in class.
He is standing at the door.
She is coming home right now.
I am waiting for the bus.
She is helping her mother now.
I am using my phone now.
She is opening the window.
He is closing the door now.
I am calling my friend now.
She is sending a message.
I am thinking about my answer.

quiz.question: Which word signals Present Continuous?
quiz.explanation: 'Right now' shows action happening this moment.

quiz.question: What is the woman doing in the picture?
quiz.explanation: Bat said the woman is cooking in the kitchen.

quiz.question: What is the man doing?
quiz.explanation: Bat described the man reading a newspaper.

quiz.question: How many children are playing?
quiz.explanation: Two children are playing in the garden.

quiz.question: What is the dog doing?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai said the dog is running and barking.

quiz.question: What grammar topic are they studying?
quiz.explanation: The students are learning Present Continuous.

quiz.question: They are ___ football in the garden.
What are the students doing right now?
quiz.explanation: The students answered 'We are learning English!'.

page1.grammarTopic: Present Continuous — I am doing / She is eating right now
page1.grammarExplanation: Present Continuous describes actions happening RIGHT NOW. Form: am/is/are + verb + -ing. Compare: 'I study English every day.' (habit — Simple) vs 'I am studying English right now.' (NOW — Continuous). Signal words: now, right now, at the moment, look!, currently. Present Continuous нь яг одоо болж буй үйлдлийг тодорхойлдог. Хэлбэр: am/is/are + үйл үг + -ing. Чухал үгс: now, right now, at the moment, look!.
commonMistakes: I am eat now. → I am EATING now.
She is study now. → She IS STUDYING now.
They are play football. → They are PLAYING football.
I studying English. → I AM studying English.

page2.readingPassage: It is 7 o'clock in the morning. Bat's family is very busy right now. His mother is cooking breakfast in the kitchen. His father is washing his car outside. His sister is brushing her teeth in the bathroom. Bat is studying his English vocabulary. The cat is sleeping on the sofa. Everyone is doing something! Bat thinks: 'My family is working hard today!'
speakingQuestions: 1. What are you doing right now? / Та яг одоо юу хийж байна вэ?
2. What is your mother doing at home right now?
4. Are you studying hard this week?
5. What are you thinking about right now?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I am studying for the English test tomorrow.

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: No, I am studying with my friend Sarnai.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What is Sarnai doing right now?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: She is reading the grammar notes.

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What about you? What are you studying?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I am memorizing the vocabulary words.

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Teacher: Look at the picture! What is happening? Bat, describe it. Bat: A woman is cooking in the kitchen. A man is reading a newspaper. Teacher: Good! What are the children doing? Bat: Two children are playing in the garden. One child is sleeping. Teacher: Excellent! Sarnai, what is the dog doing? Sarnai: The dog is running in the garden and barking! Teacher: Perfect! What are YOU doing right now, class? Students: We are learning English! We are studying Present Continuous!

listeningQuestions.question: What is the woman doing in the picture?
What are the students doing right now?
What grammar topic are they studying?

homework: Writing: Write 5 sentences about what your family members are doing RIGHT NOW.
Vocabulary: Write the -ing form of all 20 verbs from today (brush→brushing, etc.).
Speaking: Look around you and say 5 things that are happening now!
Review: Practice Simple vs Continuous — 'I study' (every day) vs 'I am studying' (now).
completionSummary: Read about Bat's busy family morning
